name: Ziti
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons diced sundried tomatoes (not the oil-marinated ones - the dry ones)
1/2 cup fat-free Alpine Lace mozzarella (which tastes more like Monterey Jack)
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil for pasta.
2. In a separate pan, sauté garlic in red wine until soft.
3. Add chiles and sauté until fragrant.
4. Stir in tomato sauce and diced sundried tomatoes.
5. Simmer the sauce until it reduces to about 3/4 cup.
6. When the pasta is cooked al dente, drain it and return it to the pot.
7. Add the reduced tomato sauce mixture, mozzarella cheese, and toss to combine.
8. Top each serving with a tablespoon of cilantro "pesto".
9. Serve with bread and salad.
Cilantro "Pesto":
1. Process garlic in a food processor until it forms a paste.
2. Add cilantro leaves and puree to create the pesto.
